text:
A transcript of the judgment is necessary:

[so that the expert can carry out a[n] [risk] assessment based on the findings made;]

[to inform the welfare hearing;]

[so that [name] may [be advised whether to] apply for permission to appeal the order made [today]/ [on [date].]

The cost of the transcript must be [paid by the local authority] / [shared by all parties equally] / [met as a public expense].

Variation of orders

Any application to vary this or any other order is to be made to the allocated judge on notice to all parties.

The application may be by email to the court for the attention of the allocated judge provided that the parties agree, a consent order is lodged with the application, and the email application clearly states the effect of the proposed variation on the timetable for the proceedings.

No. | Finding | Judgment paragraph(s)

1. | [insert narrative text of finding] | [insert paragraph number if written judgment or “Not applicable” if oral judgment]

2. | [etc.] | [etc.]

3. | [etc.] | [etc.]
